description: A ground-level photograph depicting a natural or semi-natural coniferous forest. The image shows numerous slender, tall coniferous trees, likely pine or spruce species, with a dense, green understorey of small shrubs, grasses, and moss covering the uneven forest floor. Dappled sunlight filters through the tree canopy. In the bottom left corner, the copyright text "© Eurostat LUZS 2008" is visible. This photograph serves as an example of a "Natural & semi-natural coniferous forest," aligning with descriptions of vegetation formations composed principally of coniferous trees, including shrub and bush understoreys.
